notableEvents.label: Carson Benge plunked
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge hit by pitch. Luis Torrens to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette hits a grand slam (8) to right field. MJ Melendez scores. Luis Torrens scores. Carson Benge scores.

notableEvents.label: Jared Young GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young grounds into a double play, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Jared Young out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Fielding error by first baseman Jared Young on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Jared Young. Ozzie Albies out at 2nd. Dominic Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eli White pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eli White singles on a ground ball to shortstop Bo Bichette, deflected by third baseman Brett Baty. Ozzie Albies scores. Austin Riley to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Rowdy Tellez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rowdy Tellez flies out to left fielder Juan Soto.
